SEARCH

Interface IAnalyzePokemonData

All Known Implementing Classes:
AnalyzePokemonData
public interface IAnalyzePokemonData
Interface for analyzing Pokemon data extracted from CSV format. Defines contract for classes that parse and extract character information from raw CSV-formatted data.
Version:
3.0
Author:
Christopher Perez

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HashSet<String>
    getAllCharacterNames(ArrayList<String> originalData)
    Extracts all unique Pokemon character names from the provided data.

  • Method Details

    • getAllCharacterNames

      HashSet<String> getAllCharacterNames(ArrayList<String> originalData)
      Extracts all unique Pokemon character names from the provided data. Parses CSV-formatted data and retrieves character names from a predetermined column index. Implementations should handle quotation marks and whitespace appropriately.
      Parameters:
      originalData - an ArrayList containing CSV-formatted strings, where each string represents one line of Pokemon data
      Returns:
      a HashSet containing all unique Pokemon character names found in the data, with special characters cleaned
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if a line has fewer expected columns
